overall.description: A nighttime drive through a rain-soaked futuristic metropolis in Cyberpunk 2077. The vehicle navigates neon-lit streets, stops at traffic lights, and passes through a distinctive red-lit tunnel before stopping at a final intersection dominated by corporate signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane arterial road with towering digital billboards

events.description: approaching red traffic light and slowing to stop behind other vehicles
vehicle comes to complete stop at intersection behind a white sports car

agents.ego_description: driving through neon-lit downtown streets following traffic flow, navigating wet reflective roads

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi overtaking on the left side at high speed

entered.detail: large illuminated corporate sign spanning across the road overhead
tall building facade covered in glowing advertisements and holographic displays
building covered with multiple layered neon signs and video screens
tall pole with horizontal traffic signals showing red light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a drive down a rain-slicked multi-lane road in a futuristic city, dominated by the overhead MARMUS BANK sign and towering digital billboards on both sides. A yellow taxi overtakes on the left as the vehicle approaches a red traffic light, eventually coming to a stop behind other traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with pedestrian crosswalks and digital advertising

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green signaling vehicles to proceed
vehicle accelerates from stop and enters the intersection

agents.ego_description: stopped at red light observing the intersection and waiting for signal change

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians waiting at the corner to cross the street

entered.detail: circular digital display showing a monochrome face advertisement
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle waits at a red light at a major intersection, with a large circular face hologram visible on the right building. Pedestrians gather at the corner while the traffic light changes to green, allowing the vehicle to accelerate forward into the crosswalk area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered transit corridor with intense red neon ceiling lighting

events.description: entering covered tunnel with distinctive red neon ceiling lighting
exiting tunnel back to open street with tall spire building visible ahead

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the covered corridor passing under intense red neon lights

entered.detail: overhead metal framework structure with intense red LED strip lighting creating a tunnel effect
elevated roadway crossing above the tunnel entrance
digital advertising screens mounted on the tunnel walls showing various products

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a distinctive covered tunnel bathed in intense red neon light from overhead strips, with digital billboards lining the walls. The enclosed corridor creates a dramatic color shift from the blue-purple city lights to saturated red before opening back up to the main street.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district intersection with prominent corporate signage

events.description: approaching final intersection and slowing down behind other vehicles
vehicle comes to final stop at intersection beneath Pondsmith sign

agents.ego_description: cruising through downtown streets approaching the final destination intersection

notable_agents.action: dark colored car ahead slowing to stop at the intersection

entered.detail: red rectangular corporate sign with white text spanning across the road overhead
tall cylindrical building with vertical purple and white neon strip lighting
ground floor commercial spaces with illuminated signage and entrances

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the vehicle drives toward a final intersection dominated by the red Pondsmith sign overhead and a tall neon-lit spire building in the background. The vehicle slows and stops at the crosswalk, with pedestrians visible on the sidewalks and shopfronts lining the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a rain-slicked futuristic city that transitions from a high-speed corridor of digital billboards to a bustling urban intersection. It begins with a steady movement down a multi-lane road beneath a towering MARMUS BANK sign, as a yellow taxi overtakes the vehicle on the left. As the vehicle approaches a red traffic light, the momentum slows and comes to a complete stop behind other traffic amidst the glow of towering advertisements. The scene then shifts focus to the surrounding intersection, where a large circular face hologram looms over pedestrians gathered on the corner. Finally, as the light changes to green, the camera accelerates forward, gliding through the crosswalk and back into the flow of the neon-lit metropolis.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a saturated, enclosed corridor into a wide, neon-lit urban intersection. It begins as the vehicle enters a covered tunnel bathed in intense red neon light from overhead strips and digital billboards, creating a dramatic color shift from the city's blue-purple tones. As the vehicle emerges from the tunnel, the environment opens back up to the main street, shifting the perspective toward a distant, towering neon-lit spire. The scene then expands to reveal a final intersection dominated by a red Pondsmith sign overhead before the vehicle slows and comes to a stop at a crosswalk lined with pedestrians and shopfronts.
